name: subroutine
description: Ambient implementation discipline for TypeScript monorepos — paths-activated knowledge skills that silently bind every edit to type-safety, Result/unwrap, Zod validation, code-organisation, React, and Hono pipeline rules. No workflows, no commands: the discipline applies itself when matching files are touched. Defers to the repo's own AGENTS.md. Cross-runtime (Claude Code + Codex).

interface.shortDescription: Ambient TypeScript discipline — knowledge skills that bind every edit to strict rules
interface.longDescription: Subroutine is pure ambient discipline: six knowledge skills that activate when matching files are touched and silently bind the work to strict rules — type-safety (no any/as/!, ts-pattern exhaustive), the Result/ok/err pattern with boundary unwrapping, Zod validation, named-export code organisation, React component structure, and the layered Hono pipeline. It runs no workflows and answers no commands; the repo's own AGENTS.md always wins over its rules.
defaultPrompt: Implement this React component — subroutine's ambient discipline keeps it type-safe.
Add this Hono procedure — subroutine's ambient discipline enforces the Result/unwrap pipeline.
